all_prs.title: av1_roi_v2_svt230: ROI preprocessing + bundled SVT-AV1 v2.3.0 (score: 1.94)
all_prs.author: EthanYangTW
all_prs.body_excerpt:
## Summary

- Score: **1.94** (beats current best of 1.95)

## Approach

**ROI-aware preprocessing** (`preprocess.py`):
- Detects sky/hood regions via color/position heuristics
- Applies luma denoising (strength 2.5) and chroma smoothing to non-road regions
- Feathered mask (radius 24) with 50% blend to avoid hard boundaries
- Preserves full quality on road, vehicles, and lane markings

**Encoding** (SVT-AV1):
- 45% Lanczos downscale → CRF 33, preset 0, keyint 180, film grain 22
- Bundles `libSv

all_prs.title: av1_roi_v2_svt230: ROI preprocessing + bundled SVT-AV1 v2.3.0 (score: 1.94)

all_prs.title: Add middle-band single-stream submission (damir_bearclaw_003)
all_prs.author: dwallener
all_prs.body_excerpt:
## Summary

This PR adds `damir_bearclaw_003`, a single-stream representation-oriented submission.

Instead of preserving the whole frame uniformly, it:

- stores only the middle 50% of the frame
- applies boundary-preserving smoothing to that middle band
- reconstructs synthetic top and bottom filler bands during inflate

This does not beat our previous best leaderboard score. That is intentional. The goal here is to probe the point where proxy-fidelity improvements become less practically mean

issues.title: Question about final judging set for the video compression challenge
Metric feedback: PoseNet seems to overweight low-value temporal variation outside the decision-critical scene
Can submissions be made privately (e.g. via Google Form)?
